rejections.detail: Primarily provider-owned assistant for own service ecosystem, not clear multi-provider comparison agent.

rejections.company: Walmart Sparky / Amazon Rufus / Wayfair Muse
rejections.detail: Primarily merchant-owned assistants that optimize shopping within their own ecosystems.

rejections.reason: insufficient proof of agentic or commerce relevance
rejections.detail: Public evidence reviewed was mainly hiring activity, not a clearly validated consumer AI agent workflow.
No strong public proof of AI-agent-led transaction execution.
Excluded where no clear comparison, switching, optimization, or transaction impact was documented.
